creator: evenson@panix.com
text:
mozilla built from current (as of May 02 2001) cvsup of ports tree segfaults on startup.

build against ORBit-0.5.7 XFree86-4.0.3_3 bzip2-1.0.1 gettext-0.10.35 glib-1.2.10 gmake-3.79.1 gtk-1.2.10 jpeg-6b png-1.0.10 all built from ports.
